# Chart First Fixture

## Revenue

This paragraph explains the revenue table below in enough words that the caption is certain to run past two rendered lines at any reasonable card width, which is exactly the situation the Read more control exists for, so a test can assert that it appears and expands the full text inline when clicked.

| Region | Revenue |
|---|---|
| North | 120 |
| South | 90 |
| East | 60 |

## Short note

Brief.

## Long note

This section has no chartable content whatsoever, so it stays a de-emphasised text card instead of being forced into a widget it does not fit, and because it also runs well past two rendered lines it must offer the same Read more control that a chart caption does.
